final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of Korean-café-style fashionable coffee and desserts, no people, shot in a smartphone aesthetic suitable for Instagram — then overlaid with hand-drawn white-pen annotations in a diary-note style for each visible element.

Style/medium: smartphone flat-lay / slightly overhead editorial photo, Korean café aesthetic (clean marble surfaces, pastel props, natural window light); annotation layer rendered as white-pen hand-drawn illustration overlay — one-stroke style, slightly rough and uneven lines, as if tracing the outlines of each object; overall finish is Instagram Stories × magazine rough-notes hybrid, fashionable yet casual
Composition: overhead or slight 3/4 angle flat-lay, generous negative space left intentionally for annotation breathing room, objects arranged in a loose asymmetric Korean café composition
Subject: a latte or dalgona-style coffee drink with visible foam art, one or two photogenic desserts (e.g. a slice of basque cheesecake or a small tart), ceramic cup and saucer, perhaps a small spoon or linen napkin — no human figures
Scene/backdrop: clean café table surface (marble or light wood), soft natural side-lighting, blurred warm café background
Lighting/mood: soft diffused natural window light, warm and intimate, no harsh shadows — gentle and dreamy mood
Color palette: warm creamy whites and beige as base, soft caramel and brown tones from coffee, one or two muted pastel accents; annotation lines in pure white
Materials/textures: ceramic glaze, foam micro-bubbles, matte linen, smooth marble grain
Text (verbatim): hand-drawn Japanese handwriting annotations (7割ひらがな・3割かんじ) placed near each element — short, diary-like murmurs in the tone of "日記・ひとこと・気持ちをのせた言葉":
  • coffee/drink → taste · temperature · mood (e.g. "ほっこり☕" / "やさしい甘さ…" / "あたたかい")
  • dessert/food → texture · deliciousness (e.g. "しっとり♡" / "さいこう…！")
  • space/atmosphere → vibe (e.g. "落ち着く" / "いい時間")
  • overall one-liner (e.g. "しあわせすぎた〜♡")
  White-pen annotation style: thin one-stroke lines tracing object outlines, arrows or dashed lines as eye-guides, small decorative elements — steam wisps, sparkle stars ✦, tiny hearts ♡, small emoji-like faces — added in moderation; leave intentional white space, do not crowd
Constraints: no people, no human hands or faces; annotation text must be Japanese (hiragana-dominant); white pen lines must look hand-drawn and slightly imperfect, not digital-clean; negative space must be preserved for the diary-note aesthetic
Avoid: over-saturated colors, harsh flash lighting, perfectly uniform digital linework, English text annotations, cluttered composition with no breathing room, generic stock-photo styling
